title: Simon Property Group Stock: Buy The Dip Hand-Over-Fist
text: SPG stock has pulled back by ~17% over the past few months due to a combination of recession fears and a tougher refinancing environment. We believe that the pullback is an attractive opportunity.

title: Simon Property Group Is A Buy Despite A Deteriorating Outlook
text: Simon Property Group is likely going to face significant headwinds from weakening consumer spending in the medium term and from the e-commerce transition in the long term. It is true that these will likely hinder future growth, but at the right price, SPG stock is a BUY. Today, we are at that price.

title: Simon Property Group: Preferred Over Treasuries
